column7: The storytelling in this movie was emotionally powerful.
column8: The story made me feel strong emotions.
column9: The emotional moments felt genuine and realistic.
column10: The characters' emotional experiences were clearly expressed.
column11: The story focused strongly on characters' feelings and relationships.
column12: I feel attached to the characters in this movie.
column13: I still think about this movie or its characters after watching it.
column14: I would like to watch this movie again in the future.
column15: I would recommend this movie to others.
column16: This movie has a special place in my memory compared to other movies.
